meaning: n.(西班牙西北部的)加利西亚(Galicia)人
examples: He made contact but left Gallego an out.
Madrid had Camacho, Gallego... The Club made it clear what my obligations were.
Gallego Martinez was a Spanish monk who was forced to leave his order15 after taking ill.
The group, formed to help clean up the oil spill and demand justice, lists its name in the gallego language of the northwest Galicia region.
Roy Bagtikan Gallego was shot in Lianga town in the southern Philippines as he was about to start a new programme on 92.7 Smile FM San Francisco.
